lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Bones!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I don't have any bones!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then how do you stand up?

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you stand up if you have no bones? Shouldn't you collapse into a gelatinous blob?

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need bones for?

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: To stand up properly. Otherwise I'd collapse into a gelatinous blob!

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha!

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: No, seriously, I need bones to use as a Construction material. We always need big bones to prop up the mine shafts and to make other temporary structures.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you buy anything besides bones?

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Well, I've had a few people bring me some interesting giant shells. They say they came from giant snails and giant tortoises.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Of course, like the bones, some shells are better than others. I'll give you 250gp for ordinary shells, but what I really need are perfect shells. I'll pay double for them and give you a few tips about Crafting too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of bones do you need?

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Enormous bones, as big as you can get. Not just any big bones will do.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Sometimes you might find a particularly long, straight bone. That's the kind of thing I need; I'll give you 1,000gp for one of them.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Occasionally, you might find a long curved bone - these are especially valuable - I'll give you 2,000gp for them.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll also teach you a bit about how we use the bones in Construction, if you like.

sections.title: With curved bones or long bones in the player's inventory or bank

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Those bones! Those are exactly the sort of thing I need! Will you sell them?

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll give you [X] gp for the bones you're carrying and for any you have in your bank.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll try to teach you something about Construction as well, but it's highly technical so you won't understand if you don't already have level 30 Construction.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Thanks! Now, let me explain...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

sections.title: With snail shells or perfect snail shells in the player's inventory

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: That giant shell...what is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a giant snail shell!

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll give you [X] gp for the snail shells you're carrying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Thanks. If you find any more shells like these, please bring them to me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them, especially that perfect one.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll give you [X] gp for the snail shell you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Thanks! Now, I don't think I could use that for Construction, but maybe I could make something...

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them, especially those perfect ones.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll give you [X] gp for the snail shells you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Thanks! Now, I don't think I could use that for Construction, but maybe I could make something...

sections.title: With tortoise shells or perfect shells in the player's inventory

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: That giant shell...what is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a giant battle tortoise shell!

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll give you [X] gp for the tortoise shells you're carrying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Thanks. If you find any more shells like these, please bring them to me!

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: That other giant shell...what is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a giant snail shell!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them, especially that perfect one.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll give you [X] gp for the tortoise shell you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Thanks! Now, I don't think I could use that for Construction, but maybe I could make something...

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: That other giant shell...what is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a giant snail shell!

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them, especially those perfect ones.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: I'll give you [X] gp for the tortoise shells you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: Thanks! Now, I don't think I could use that for Construction, but maybe I could make something...

lines.speaker: Barlak
lines.text: That other giant shell...what is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a giant snail shell!
